fixtures.description: Yang male (Dương Nam) → forward traversal, order 0 at Mệnh.
fixtures.manualDerivation: Yang+male => forward (directionSign=+1) per POL-MF-YIN-YANG-GENDER. order0 palace = modulo12(menhIndex + 0*directionSign) = modulo12(0) = 0 (== menhIndex, per POL-MF-STARTING-PALACE). start = cucNumber + 0*10 = 2. end = 11. age=2 falls in [2,11] => cycleIndex 0 active.
Yin+female => forward (directionSign=+1) per POL-MF-YIN-YANG-GENDER (yin_female: forward). order0 palace = modulo12(3+0) = 3. start = 3+0 = 3, end = 12. age=3 in [3,12] => cycleIndex 0.

Yin+male => reverse (directionSign=-1) per POL-MF-YIN-YANG-GENDER. order0 palace = modulo12(5+0*-1) = 5 (order 0 is always the base palace regardless of direction sign). start = 4, end = 13. age=4 in [4,13] => cycleIndex 0.
Yang+female => reverse (directionSign=-1) per POL-MF-YIN-YANG-GENDER. order0 palace = 8 (base palace). start = 6, end = 15. age=6 in [6,15] => cycleIndex 0.
palaceIndex(3) = modulo12(0 + 3*1) = 3. start = 2 + 3*10 = 32, end = 41. age=32 in [32,41] => cycleIndex 3.
palaceIndex(3) = modulo12(0 + 3*-1) = modulo12(-3) = 9. start = 32, end = 41. age=32 in [32,41] => cycleIndex 3.

fixtures.description: Forward wrap-around: start palace 11, one forward step wraps to 0.
fixtures.manualDerivation: palaceIndex(1) = modulo12(11 + 1*1) = modulo12(12) = 0. start = 5+10 = 15, end = 24. age=15 in [15,24] => cycleIndex 1.

fixtures.description: Reverse wrap-around: start palace 0, one reverse step wraps to 11.
fixtures.manualDerivation: palaceIndex(1) = modulo12(0 + 1*-1) = modulo12(-1) = 11. start = 15, end = 24. age=15 in [15,24] => cycleIndex 1.

fixtures.description: Age immediately before the Cục-derived starting age: no active Major Fortune.
fixtures.manualDerivation: cucNumber=4. For every order in [0,11], start = 4 + order*10 >= 4. age=3 < 4 (the minimum possible start), so no order's [start,end] range contains age 3. Per POL-MF-PARTIAL-FIRST-CYCLE, this returns no active cycle (childhood/pre-fortune), not a fabricated decade.

fixtures.description: Age exactly equals the Cục-derived starting age: order 0 becomes active.
fixtures.manualDerivation: order0: palace = modulo12(2+0) = 2. start = 4+0 = 4, end = 13. age=4 == start => cycleIndex 0 active, first year of the decade.

fixtures.description: Age at the final year of a decade: still the same cycle.
fixtures.manualDerivation: order0 range is [4,13]. age=13 == end => still cycleIndex 0, last year before the next decade begins.

fixtures.description: Age exactly entering the next decade: cycle index increments, palace advances by one step.
fixtures.manualDerivation: order1: palace = modulo12(2+1*1) = 3. start = 4+10 = 14, end = 23. age=14 == start => cycleIndex 1 becomes active exactly at this age.

fixtures.description: Target solar date one day before the lunar-year (Tết) boundary: nominal age not yet incremented.

input.note: Tết Nguyên Đán (Giáp Thìn) fell on 2024-02-10 — a public calendar fact, not a Tử Vi-specific claim.

fixtures.manualDerivation: 2024-02-09 is before the 2024-02-10 lunar rollover, so targetLunarYear=2023. nominalAge = max(1, 2023-2023+1) = 1. cucNumber=3, age=1 < 3 => no active cycle (POL-MF-PARTIAL-FIRST-CYCLE), consistent with MF-FIX-009.

fixtures.description: Target solar date exactly at the lunar-year (Tết) boundary: nominal age increments.
fixtures.manualDerivation: 2024-02-10 is the lunar rollover day itself, so targetLunarYear=2024. nominalAge = max(1, 2024-2023+1) = 2. cucNumber=3, age=2 < 3 => still no active cycle, but the age value itself has incremented from 1 (MF-FIX-013) to 2 exactly at this boundary.

fixtures.description: Target solar date well after the lunar-year boundary: nominal age stable at the incremented value.
fixtures.manualDerivation: 2024-03-01 is still within lunar year 2024 (no further rollover has occurred). nominalAge = max(1, 2024-2023+1) = 2, same as MF-FIX-014 — confirms the boundary is a single once-per-lunar-year event, not a moving/solar-birthday-based value.

fixtures.description: Comparison fixture: for the same birth/target dates, the selected calendar-year model and the two rejected candidate models (birthday, Lập Xuân solar term) would disagree — documenting why POL-MF-BIRTHDAY-BOUNDARY and POL-MF-SOLAR-TERM-BOUNDARY are rejected, not silently omitted.

input.note: 1991-02-01 is before Tết Tân Mùi (1991-02-15) and before the solar birthday anniversary (1991-06-15), but after Lập Xuân 1991 (commonly ~1991-02-04) in years where the two do not coincide with Tết.

fixtures.manualDerivation: Selected model (POL-MF-CALENDAR-BOUNDARY): targetSolarDate 1991-02-01 is before Tết Tân Mùi (1991-02-15), so the operative nominal age is still based on lunar year 1990 => nominalAge = max(1, 1990-1990+1) = 1. Rejected candidate CP-2 (birthday boundary) would instead only increment on 1991-06-15, so at 1991-02-01 it would ALSO report age 1 by coincidence in this example — the two candidates are not always distinguishable on every date, which is exactly why a single explicit selection (not silent mixing) is required per the mission. Rejected candidate CP-3 (Lập Xuân, ~1991-02-04 in most almanacs) would not yet have incremented either by 1991-02-01. This fixture exists to document that the two rejected policies were genuinely evaluated for this scenario, not merely left blank; POL-MF-BIRTHDAY-BOUNDARY and POL-MF-SOLAR-TERM-BOUNDARY remain status=rejected regardless of any date-specific agreement or disagreement.
